user.title: KR Finance Kit
user.description:
Everything fits on one page. Each field is optional — leave blank to disable that feature.

When an **OpenDart key** and **KR tickers** are both set, the same tickers automatically drive price sensors, disclosure binary_sensors, AND friendly company-name labels (e.g. "삼성전자" instead of "005930").

**Get an OpenDart key** (free, instant):
• [Sign up — opendart.fss.or.kr/uss/umt/EgovMberInsertView.do]({opendart_signup_url})
• [Request API key — opendart.fss.or.kr/mng/apiUseStusUser.do]({opendart_key_url})

**Where to find ticker codes (click to open)**:
• 🇰🇷 KR (6-digit number):
  [KRX listed company directory — kind.krx.co.kr/corpgeneral/corpList.do]({krx_search_url})
  [Naver Finance market list — finance.naver.com/sise/sise_market_sum.naver]({naver_finance_url})
• 🇺🇸 US (ticker symbol):
  [Yahoo Finance Lookup — finance.yahoo.com/lookup]({yahoo_finance_url})

Examples: Samsung Electronics=005930, SK Hynix=000660, NAVER=035420, Kakao=035720.KQ, Apple=AAPL, Microsoft=MSFT, Tesla=TSLA

data_description.opendart_api_key: Blank disables disclosure monitoring AND company-name labels (price sensors still work)
data_description.kr_tickers: e.g. 005930, 000660 — 6-digit = KOSPI; add .KQ for KOSDAQ (e.g. 035720.KQ). With an OpenDart key, company names display automatically

error.invalid_api_key: OpenDart key is not valid. Verify it at opendart.fss.or.kr.

init.title: KR Finance Kit options
init.description:
Edit any value you set at install. **Saving auto-reloads the integration** so changes take effect immediately.

**What changes when**:
• **Add a KR ticker** → its price sensor appears immediately. With an OpenDart key, the disclosure binary_sensor and Korean company-name label come along automatically.
• **Remove a KR ticker** → its sensor is removed.
• **Clear the OpenDart key** → disclosure binary_sensors and company-name labels are disabled (price sensors keep working).
• **Enter a new OpenDart key** → corpCode.xml is re-downloaded and corp_codes / names are re-mapped.

**Where to find ticker codes (click to open)**:
• 🇰🇷 KR (6-digit number):
  [KRX listed company directory — kind.krx.co.kr/corpgeneral/corpList.do]({krx_search_url})
  [Naver Finance market list — finance.naver.com/sise/sise_market_sum.naver]({naver_finance_url})
• 🇺🇸 US (ticker symbol):
  [Yahoo Finance Lookup — finance.yahoo.com/lookup]({yahoo_finance_url})

Examples: Samsung Electronics=005930, SK Hynix=000660, NAVER=035420, Kakao=035720.KQ, Apple=AAPL, Microsoft=MSFT, Tesla=TSLA

**Get an OpenDart key** (free, instant):
• [Sign up — opendart.fss.or.kr/uss/umt/EgovMberInsertView.do]({opendart_signup_url})
• [Request API key — opendart.fss.or.kr/mng/apiUseStusUser.do]({opendart_key_url})

Note: holdings (quantity / avg price) are managed via the `kr_finance_kit.add_position` service, not this screen — you don't need to touch them here.

data_description.opendart_api_key: Re-validated on save. Paste a freshly rotated key here. Blank disables disclosures + name mapping
data_description.kr_tickers: e.g. 005930, 000660, 035720.KQ — comma-separated. Sensors follow add/remove automatically. With an OpenDart key, company names are auto-mapped
data_description.us_tickers: e.g. AAPL, MSFT, TSLA — US tickers are unaffected by OpenDart and always render as codes
data_description.include_fx: Disabling removes sensor.kr_finance_kit_usdkrw. The USD→KRW-converted portfolio totals also go offline, so keep this on if you hold US tickers

error.invalid_api_key: OpenDart key is not valid. Verify it at opendart.fss.or.kr.
